name: cisco-uc-engineer
description: Orchestrates all Cisco UC CLI tools for troubleshooting, provisioning, and monitoring
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-axl-cli
description: Manage CUCM via AXL — phones, lines, route patterns, SIP profiles, SQL queries
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-ise-cli
description: Manage Cisco ISE — endpoints, guests, network devices, RADIUS/TACACS
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-yang-cli
description: Manage IOS-XE devices via RESTCONF — voice troubleshooting, dial-peers, SIP trace
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-risport-cli
description: Query CUCM real-time device registration — phone status, SIP trunk health
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-perfmon-cli
description: Collect CUCM performance counters — CPU, memory, call stats, sparklines
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-dime-cli
description: Manage CUCM log files — selecting, downloading service logs via DIME
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-cdr-mcp
description: Query CUCM call detail records via MCP — CDR search, call tracing, quality stats
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-support-cli
description: Query Cisco Support APIs — bug search, EoL dates, PSIRT advisories, RMA tracking
author: sieteunoseis

name: cisco-ucce-cli
description: Monitor Cisco UCCE — agent states, queue stats, PG diagnostics, system health
author: sieteunoseis

name: audiocodes-cli
description: Troubleshoot VoIP on AudioCodes SBCs — call stats, alarms, SIP trace
author: sieteunoseis

name: genesys-cli
description: Query Genesys Cloud — agent states, queue stats, routing diagnostics
author: sieteunoseis

name: ss-cli
description: Manage secrets from Delinea Secret Server — credentials, env sync, password rotation
author: sieteunoseis

name: wmill-safety
description: Windmill CLI safety guard — risk tiers, pre-flight checklists, destructive operation protection
author: sieteunoseis

name: wmill-commit
description: Git commits with conventional commit format for Windmill development
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-review
description: Code review PRs for bugs and CLAUDE.md compliance in Windmill repos
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-pr
description: Open draft pull requests with conventional commit titles for Windmill repos
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-refine
description: End-of-session reflection — update docs with lessons learned
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-native-trigger
description: Guide for adding native trigger services to Windmill (backend + frontend)
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-rust-backend
description: Rust coding guidelines for the Windmill backend
author: windmill-labs

name: wmill-svelte-frontend
description: Svelte coding guidelines for the Windmill frontend
author: windmill-labs
